review_text: This moisturizer made my face red and itchy after two uses. I have sensitive skin and it felt too harsh.
It feels very greasy and takes a long time to absorb. My skin looked shiny for hours.
The product caused burning around my cheeks. I stopped using it after one day.
The texture is rich and hydrating, but the fragrance is stronger than I expected.
The bottle leaked during shipping and some product was wasted before I opened it.
It works well for dry skin and kept my face soft overnight.
I wanted something lightweight, but this felt oily and heavy on my face.
The smell is too strong. The moisturizer itself is okay, but I would prefer fragrance-free.
My skin became irritated and red. I would not recommend it for sensitive skin.
Good hydration, but the pump is hard to use and sometimes gets stuck.
